decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to utilize cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack to cheat big creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play early in the game. The deck also includes cards like Force of Will and Daze for protection, as well as cantrips like Ponder and Brainstorm for card selection. By using these powerful combo pieces, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm and outpace the opponent with massive threats that can end the game in just a few turns.

The deck relies on utilizing artifact cards to generate mana and card advantage in order to quickly deploy threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Emry, Lurker of the Loch provides recursion for key artifacts while cards like Thoughtcast and Urza's Bauble help maintain card advantage. Urza's Saga and Mox Opal allow for explosive starts and generate additional resources. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive artifact creatures and disruption spells, while also having the flexibility to adapt to various board states through its versatile card selection.

This deck focuses on quickly getting out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By using powerful combo pieces and disruption like Force of Will and Flusterstorm, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Stock Up and Brainstorm allow for card advantage and deck manipulation, while cards like Omniscience and Archon of Cruelty provide additional powerful plays. The deck is built to quickly establish board control and win the game through its powerful creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain control with disruptive counterspells like Force of Will and Daze, while also utilizing efficient card selection and removal spells such as Brainstorm, Ponder, Lightning Bolt, and Unholy Heat. The deck aims to quickly establish a board presence with aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, supported by card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Mishra's Bauble. The mana base is optimized for early game plays and mana denial with Wasteland, ensuring the deck can stay ahead and pressure the opponent effectively.

The deck focuses on using Cloudpost lands to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing for powerful plays such as casting high-costed Eldrazi creatures and powerful artifacts. It utilizes cards like Crop Rotation, Expedition Map, and Boseiju, Who Endures to search for key pieces of the combo while also controlling the game with cards like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Karn, the Great Creator. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with threats that are difficult to deal with and secure victory through a combination of ramp, card advantage, and powerful board presence.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Cephalid Breakfast combo, utilizing cards like Cephalid Illusionist, Nomads en-Kor, and Shuko to mill through the library and put cards like Narcomoeba and Thassa's Oracle into play. The deck aims to combo off while protecting the combo pieces with counter spells like Force of Will and disruption cards like Cabal Therapy. The inclusion of various tutors like Urza's Saga and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps to find key pieces of the combo quickly. The goal is to win the game in a quick and efficient manner.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while efficiently deploying threats to apply pressure. Utilizing cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's plays, combined with tempo plays like Daze and Wasteland to keep them off balance. Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provide powerful threats that can quickly close out games. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm help to filter through the deck and find the necessary answers. The deck aims to control the game tempo and win quickly with a combination of disruption and aggression.

This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy with a combination of discard spells and countermagic while establishing early board presence with efficient creatures like Nethergoyf and Orcish Bowmasters. The tempo strategy seeks to maintain control of the game through efficient card draw and removal while applying pressure on the opponent's life total. Murktide Regent and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provide additional threats and card advantage. The mana base is designed to support a mix of blue and black spells, with Wasteland to disrupt opposing mana bases.

The primary strategy of this deck revolves around assembling a powerful combo involving Mystic Forge and key artifacts like Glaring Fleshraker, Tezzeret, Karn, Kozilek's Command, The One Ring, and others. By utilizing cards like Manifold Key, Grim Monolith, and Planar Nexus, the deck aims to generate significant card advantage and mana acceleration to quickly overwhelm the opponent. With a mix of aggressive threats and disruptive plays, the deck seeks to swiftly execute its game plan and secure victory through a combination of board presence and combo interactions.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly generate mana and control the board with counterspells. Emry, Lurker of the Loch is used to recur key artifacts while Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer provide aggressive threats. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Chalice of the Void and Pithing Needle to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Urza's Saga is a key card that helps tutor for important artifacts, while Force of Will provides additional protection. The overall strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Guide of Souls and Voice of Victory to overwhelm the opponent. Support cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Swords to Plowshares help maintain board control. Land destruction with cards like Wasteland and Lazotep Quarry disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Hexing Squelcher and Static Prison adds disruption and control elements to the aggro strategy. The deck aims to apply early pressure, disrupt the opponent's plans, and maintain board advantage to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing disruptive spells and creatures with flash to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By efficiently removing threats and applying pressure with evasive creatures, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and force them to react defensively, allowing the pilot to maintain tempo and win the game through incremental advantages. The deck also utilizes powerful card selection and card advantage engines to ensure consistency in drawing into its key pieces and maintaining a strong board state.

This deck aims to ramp up mana quickly using cards like Gaea's Cradle and Green Sun's Zenith to search for key creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth. It also has control elements like Wasteland to disrupt opponents' mana base and Endurance to interact with opponent's graveyard. The deck has a toolbox approach with cards like Fiend Artisan and Natural Order to fetch specific answers or threats. It also has a synergy with creatures like Badgermole Cub and Springheart Nantuko to provide value and resilience. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game while building a strong board presence.

The deck focuses on using mana acceleration and creature-based control elements to ramp up quickly and overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Gaea's Cradle, Green Sun's Zenith, and Natural Order, the player can quickly assemble a powerful board presence with high-impact creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to control the game through efficient mana utilization and powerful creature threats.

The deck focuses on assembling a fast and efficient storm combo using cards like Ad Nauseam, Infernal Tutor, and Tendrils of Agony. With an emphasis on manipulating hand size and mana ramp, the deck aims to generate a high storm count and finish the opponent off with a lethal Tendrils of Agony. The Wishclaw Talisman is used to tutor for key combo pieces, while cards like Duress and Thoughtseize help disrupt the opponent's game plan. Urza's Saga provides additional value by tutoring for key artifacts, making the deck a powerful force in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures like Amped Raptor and Ocelot Pride, supported by powerful removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize. It utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory to push for damage and control the board. The deck also includes disruption cards like Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of creature aggression, removal, and disruption, this Mardu Aggro deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.
